A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent stopped early after failing to identify LGG cases by querying a non-existent column ("Cancer_type_acronym" in call_WrFCrVnpVHKgpbfSm1dY8BAP) and using an invalid filter value for the wrong field (icd_o_3_site = 'LGG' returning [] in call_l4VwllUa8XwCEYstU8Fc5sDR), concluding the task was impossible instead of using the available icd_o_3_histology and proceeding to join and average.

FM4: no

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent pursued the correct approach (linking LGG clinical histology to IGF2 expression) but selected incorrect clinical columns—first querying the non-existent "Cancer_type_acronym" (causing an error) and then using "histological_type" (yielding an empty set)—and consequently stopped without computing the required averages.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM4: no

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After failing to find a "Cancer_Type_Abbreviation" or usable "diagnosis" entries (calls call_GrgmqElY59YkfJgrk5Cr4toU and call_UsXD0oMnOQ3aJKmvRl3xumv1/call_rRGGelin1NfUvoZi3jg6Qrky) and seeing many "diagnosis" as None (call_tLDu2JuBNQZUh3ee7VaYgGX2), the agent prematurely concluded it could not identify LGG and did not use the available ICD-O-3 site/histology fields to subset LGG and compute the averages, thus stopping before completing the task.
